series_metadata.series_title: OHIO DIRECT PAYMENT PERMIT TAX RETURN (ST 902-A)
series_metadata.series_description: This form is used for the purpose of reporting the Ohio sales tax due on purchases of tangible personal property consumed in Ohio on which tax was not paid at time of purchase due to inability of purchaser to determine applicability of the tax. Direct payment permit holders are authorized by journal entry to purchase tax exempt and report the tax due when the item is deemed to be used in a taxable manner.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: microfilming - by shredding. Prior filming, data on filed returns shall be captured by data processing and retrievable by CRT or microfiche daily business functions. Returns not microfilmed will be destroyed four years received date. ; Microform: Film will be duplicated and stored separately
